title: Skeleton Ghost Ship
description: Adds a skeleton crewed ghost ship that spawns in ocean biomes
body:
**Skeleton Ghost Ship**

This mod adds a skeleton crewed Ghost Ship to the game.

![Overview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7dd8d32116cf20ce383d6ff924416a78a9596ed5.jpeg)

- All around the ship, you’ll find loot guarded by skeletons.

![Inside](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7d587a2638f285edeb14b4754a0b394fd470fe75.jpeg)

- The Ship can spawn in warm and cold ocean biomes.
- Chests feature custom loot tables, making the mod also compatible with the Lootr mod.

Feel free to put it in your modpack!
